data.content: Shipment complete. Rebased feature branch worktree-fix+code-style-views-pages onto main, resolved eslint.config.mjs conflict (cosmetic formatting difference). Fixed pre-existing test failure in settings-dispatch-global-swap-layout.test.ts where multi-line source text didn't match single-line assertion. All 2239 tests pass, typecheck clean. Pushed to origin/main.
